item.title: Lazy residents, 27th April
item.description:
The residents of station parade and the flats next door think it’s acceptable to throw their junk on the street. Impose fines.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmers End Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very, very confusing road markings all over this road. It looks like you’ve made changes to the roads without proper thinking., 27th April
item.description:
This is a piss take. You fucked up the whole roads and left all the markings from before so it’s so confusing. You don’t know where the fuck you’re going. Absolute joke needs to be sorted and needs to be sorted at night. The traffic regulations around roadwork says that that you have to cause minimum disruption that is what you need to do.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-7, Hithe Grove, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Linsey street se16 3ue, 27th April
item.description:
Job reference- 9301781(16/4/26) Job reference-9310149(17/4/26) Any idea when the gate is going to be re-locked
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lucey Way, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Another collapsed surface due to overweight electric buses which don’t have to conform to any weight limit, 27th April
item.description:
But this needs to be fixed it’s caused by buses being overweight nothing to do with cars. It’s a danger.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-7, Hithe Grove, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large graffiti tag, 27th April
item.description:
Unsightly and will generate more graft of left

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Manor Way, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Collapsed carriageway caused by overweight buses, 27th April
item.description:
At the bus stop the surface has collapsed which is caused by heavy buses which don’t have to conform to any weight limits and the electric buses are much much worse for the roads considering that buses don’t pay anything for the roads and we’re very limited by them. we need the council to fix this as drivers are the ones that pay for everything
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 166, Rotherhithe New Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please arrange for the bin to be relocated away from the residential entrances., 27th April
item.description:
This issue is still occurring today, as it does every day for residents. Rubbish is consistently left around the street litter bin directly outside the flats, including outside collection days. The bin is being used as a drop-off point for bagged waste, leading to daily build-up at residential doorways. This creates ongoing access issues and unsanitary conditions. Routine cleansing does not resolve the problem as it reoccurs each day. Please arrange for the bin to be relocated away from the residential entrances.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 83, High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping in back carpark, 27th April
item.description:
Major fly tipping again in the car park.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warwick Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All the road markings are completely missing at this junction, 27th April
item.description:
All the road markings completely missing at the junction. The giveaway line is the speed limit. Everything completely missing absolute chaos and a disgrace especially how much money you take from drivers.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Commercial Way, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing bump marking urgent, 27th April
item.description:
The speed bumps are completely missing the markings. It’s a 20 zone but there’s no way that you can do more than 5 mile an hour. These huge speed bumps it needs to be fixed and it needs to be fixed at night to avoid causing extra disruption as per regulations with roadwork
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 131-145, Meeting House Lane, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 NO2 canisters (and alcohol) left at exit to car park., 27th April
item.description:
Evidence the car park is being used as a venue for recreational drug use.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burnhill Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
